reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider TB-500 as an acute-injury-and-fibrosis-prevention agent rather than a default daily multivitamin: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:25:55.040) says, "TB500. That one you really only use it for a short period of time. It's really important you do that," while newer Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:02:26.640) says, "It is a forever peptide." We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh acute dose intensity (Trevor IKgitxmC5jA 00:00:28.800: "Two 2.5 milligrams of TB500. And I'm going to take another 5 milligrams as soon as I get off") against Hunter's caution that TB-500 is the 17-amino-acid analog of full thymosin beta-4 (Hunter PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:28:53.120: "TB500 is just a portion of thyosin beta 4. So, it's not bad. It's another option"), and to screen for active cancer before long-term use.
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Active-cancer screen: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:33:33.120): "you want to screen people before you don't want to use it in active cancer. you don't want to use it long term because of that."
- Cancer-fear context (Trevor disagrees): Trevor (gYNBbF1CA4o 00:14:22.400): "cancer and why it can't cause it. It's just not statistically possible." Trevor argues cancer requires "three biological failures, systemic inflammation, insulin resistance, and ATP shortage" (gYNBbF1CA4o 00:14:34.360) — but Hunter still hedges screen-first.
- Micro-dose-is-useless warning: Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:36:23.520): "Micro dose is 0.1 milligrams or less every day. Garbage. Cannot do it. It's impossible." Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:36:40.800): "a micro dose of TB500 is like whispering into a hurricane."
- TB-500 vs thymosin beta-4 confusion: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:25:55.040) frames TB500 as "the shorter analog" of "thymus and beta 4"; Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:25:14.560 paraphrased frame): the full peptide is preferred for severe healing — stroke, heart attack, vascular disease, TBI recovery. Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:00:53.199): "thymus beta TB500 to be more specific because thymus beta 4 and TB500 are not the same. Thymson beta 4 is the entire thing. TB500 is the cliffnotes critical instruction packet that it should have."
- Stings on injection: Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:46.480): "Most people can't tolerate it cuz it stings. Yes, it's blue. Just mix it in. Dilute it more."
- Combine-with-BPC cautions: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:34:48.800 frame): "It's like um twin daughters that like don't like each other and start fighting and punching each other when they're in the same room too long"; Hunter recommends using "one or two max at a time" (00:35:55.920).
- Cycling vs forever tension: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:32:09.760): "five days on two days off if we think about a week"; Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:11.519): "TB500 twice per week for 6 weeks it focuses on like systemic healing and fibrosis prevention cycle off for 6 weeks repeat"; Trevor also (IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:31.200): "problems you could just take this for the rest of your life."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: All three experts agree TB-500 is for tissue repair / healing and works synergistically with BPC-157. Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:29:11.680): "TB500 is it does tissue repair, but it's really great at preventing scarring." Taylor (XyN5pku7hZM 00:07:43.319): "if you are struggling with that because most of the times tears over time will heal themselves and sometimes you can get a lot more complications." Trevor (vJhrCKBNdWE 00:00:11.040): "it reverses myocardial damage. And it's the only one that does it to this level." Cycling-protocol overlap: Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol lists "Frequency" "Every other day," "Duration" "8 weeks on, 8 weeks off"; Taylor (XyN5pku7hZM 00:17:03.360): "8 weeks on 8 weeks off rotation with this if I was using this for a recovery from healing." Subcutaneous injection is the assumed route across all three (Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol "60 units on 1mL insulin"; Trevor IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:48.560: "Just mix it in. Dilute it more. More vials, more dilution."; Taylor oA6ZwwDtxME 00:07:00.160: "I mix them in the same syringe that I'm going to use for my injection").
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Duration: Hunter says short-cycle only — Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:25:55.040): "That one you really only use it for a short period of time. It's really important you do that." Trevor says forever — Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:02:26.640): "It is a forever peptide. I will take it off and on yet again." Cancer caution: Hunter (PEU3ZE5axiQ 00:33:33.120): "you don't want to use it in active cancer. you don't want to use it long term because of that." Trevor (gYNBbF1CA4o 00:14:22.400): "cancer and why it can't cause it. It's just not statistically possible." Dose ranges differ widely — Hunter 2023 baseline_protocol: "Dose" "2 mg" every other day; Taylor minor/recovery (XyN5pku7hZM 00:16:43.839): "on the lower end of like two milligrams"; Taylor major-injury (XyN5pku7hZM 00:16:54.800): "a 5 milligram dosing"; Taylor standalone (oA6ZwwDtxME 00:06:42.080): "1 milligram of this by itself"; Taylor with-BPC (oA6ZwwDtxME 00:06:48.680): "if I am pairing it with bpc I'm going to take 2.5 micrograms of each" (note: Taylor says "micrograms" verbatim at low single-digit numerics — preserved as spoken). Trevor chronic recommendations have shifted upward over time: older Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:37.760): "I've usually told people 200 to or 300 to 500 micrograms" but newer Trevor (IKgitxmC5jA 00:46:42.960): "I'm going to tell you 2 to three milligrams daily is significantly better." Trevor cardiac/injury research-grounded dose (IKgitxmC5jA 00:37:04.400): "5 to 10 milligrams every 5 to seven days. Not 500 micrograms mixed in a" — Trevor explicitly rejects sub-milligram dosing as ineffective.

reset_biology_synthesis.female_specific_notes: Taylor frames TB-500 dosing decisions around training/recovery cycles and surgery. Taylor (oA6ZwwDtxME 00:06:42.080): "so what I do for my dosing when I am taking this peptide is I'm going to take 1 milligram of this by itself." Taylor (oA6ZwwDtxME 00:06:48.680): "if I am pairing it with bpc I'm going to take 2.5 micrograms of each" (Taylor says "micrograms" verbatim — preserved as spoken). Taylor (XyN5pku7hZM 00:16:43.839): "I'm going to go on the lower end of like two milligrams" for fitness recovery; (XyN5pku7hZM 00:16:54.800): "a 5 milligram dosing" for major injury/torn tissue. Taylor (XyN5pku7hZM 00:17:01.800): "I would still do this for 2 weeks and then I would do an 8 weeks on 8 weeks off rotation"; (XyN5pku7hZM 00:17:19.799): "I would probably push my cycling a little bit longer with it and probably go up to 14 weeks" for surgery recovery. Taylor's audience is explicitly women — Taylor (XyN5pku7hZM 00:00:13.320): "I love teaching women how to use peptides" — but she does NOT surface a TB-500-specific contraindication for fertility or hormone interactions in these top sources. Cycling discipline (8-on-8-off) is her consistent female-facing frame.
